kingdom_banner.title: Craft a unique banner representing your civilization — place it at the center of your settlement

subtitle.text: What you leave behind is the only part of this that survives you.

description: The Oldest Civilization remembered everything. It was not enough.
The Cryptic Civilization encrypted everything. Still not enough.
The previous civilizations solved every technical problem they encountered
The thirteenth option is not a technical solution.
Legacy — the deliberate act of building something that outlasts you.
Celestisynth materials are the beginning of Ch16.
Celestial Dust is the entry point — found in End structures or crafted from End materials.
The Celestisynth system is the highest tier crafting in this pack.
It requires everything you have learned.
This civilization has a flag now.
→ Craft a banner representing your civilization [check]
